sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9789" key="a)ntibadi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιβᾰδίζω</orth>, <sense id="n9789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">go against, the contrary way,</tr_> Phot.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥαβάττειν.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
